query: we're rolling out Fabric to the whole org and I need to lock down which tenant settings let users publish to web and export to Excel. who should own those decisions?
why: Tenant settings governance and decision ownership — core admin/governance scope.

query: how do I pull the activity log into a storage account so we keep more than 28 days of usage history for auditing?
why: Activity-log extraction/monitoring for auditing — directly named in the skill's When to Use.

query: our finance team keeps complaining reports are stale; I think it's the on-prem data gateway. how many gateways should we run and who gets gateway admin?
why: Planning standard/personal/VNet gateways and gateway roles — explicit admin scope, not refresh authoring.

query: leadership wants to stand up a Center of Excellence for Power BI and measure our adoption maturity. where do we start?
why: COE establishment and adoption-maturity assessment — explicitly in scope.

query: how many fabric admins should we appoint and is it safe to give the whole IT team the admin role?
why: Appointing/auditing Fabric administrators and PIM — foundational admin principle.

query: i need to classify all our HR and payroll reports as Highly Confidential and stop people from sharing them outside the company at the tenant level
why: Org-level sensitivity labels and DLP/information protection — admin scope, not RLS authoring.

query: what's a good lightweight way to govern workspaces and domains across 40 business units without a giant approval committee?
why: Iterative governance model across workspaces/domains — governance layers scope.

query: i want to see who exported data and which reports nobody opens in the last month so we can clean up the tenant
why: Tenant inventory + usage metrics monitoring for governance cleanup — auditing scope (uncommon phrasing, doesn't name the feature).

query: capacity on our F64 keeps throttling during month-end. how do we monitor capacity utilization and decide whether to autoscale or split workspaces across capacities?
why: Capacity management and monitoring at tenant level — admin scope wins over performance-tuning a single model.

query: should we let users install their own custom visuals or should the admin approve an org visuals list, and how do we audit what's already deployed?
why: Organizational visuals governance + tenant audit — admin/governance scope, not visual selection.

query: my dashboard refresh fails every morning, the gateway shows a credentials error on the SQL connection. how do I fix the data source login?
why: Gateway keyword but it's a refresh/connection setup problem — needs connecting-data-sources.

query: i need to restrict the sales team so each rep only sees their own region's rows in the same report. how do i set that up?
why: Sounds like access control but it's row-level filtering — needs securing-row-level-access.

query: we want to promote this report from dev to test to prod automatically with deployment pipelines. how do we govern that flow?
why: 'Govern the flow' overlaps but the need is ALM/deployment pipelines — needs managing-deployment-lifecycle.

query: how do I share this finance app with the whole department and set who can edit vs view in the workspace?
why: Workspace roles/app sharing at content level — needs publishing-and-sharing-content, not tenant admin.

query: the model is 4GB and reports are painfully slow; how do I shrink it and find the bottleneck with Performance Analyzer?
why: Capacity/throttle keywords nearby but the real need is model size/perf — needs optimizing-model-performance.

query: i want to apply a sensitivity label and also hide certain columns from the marketing role inside the dataset
why: Sensitivity-label keyword overlaps, but object-level security on a model is securing-row-level-access.

query: set up automated monitoring by calling the Power BI REST admin API from a PowerShell script that runs nightly and writes to a SQL table
why: Activity/admin keywords, but the ask is REST/PowerShell automation tooling — needs embedding-and-automating.

query: how do I embed our governed exec dashboard into our internal portal app so employees see it without logging into the service?
why: 'Governed' is incidental; the task is embedding in an app — needs embedding-and-automating.

query: we need pixel-perfect printable monthly compliance statements with the company logo on every page for the audit committee
why: 'Audit/compliance' keywords but the artifact is a paginated RDL report — needs building-paginated-reports.

query: i'm an admin and want to build a usage report — what chart should i use to show monthly active users trending over the last year?
why: Admin context but the actual question is chart selection for a trend — needs mapping-questions-to-charts.
